title: Screams From The Forest (VR READY)
description: This modpack is really scary also has VR and full body tracking support it is optional not required but better for the immersion.
body:
The Forest is Alive... And It Hates You

Step into a world where every tree hides a threat, every shadow pulses with malice, and the air itself hums with distorted whispers. This is not a hike—it’s a hunt. The wilderness evolves around you, warping paths, spawning horrors, and rewriting the rules of reality. Play in VR for full-body immersion (tracking supported), where a twig snapping behind you isn’t just sound—it’s a breath on your neck.
Features

    Adaptive Terror: AI-driven entities learn from your tactics. Hide too often? They’ll sniff you out. Fight back? They’ll swarm.

    Living Environment: Trees bleed when cut. Rivers drown you in whispers. Fog shifts to isolate you from allies.

    VR Nightmare Mode: Full-body tracking integration—entities grab your virtual limbs, and headset haptics simulate crawling insects.

    Sound as a Weapon: Directional audio hallucinations (e.g., a child’s laugh over your left shoulder) paired with bone-conduction vibrations for physical dread.

Technical Specs

    Minimum: 8GB RAM, Java 17, Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)

    VR Ready: 8GB RAM, RTX2070 (Any VR headset)

FOR SHADERS PLEASE HAVE POWERFUL PC TO ATLEAST RUN IT BY DEFAULT IT IS USING NOSTALGIA SHADERS U CAN CHANGE THE SHADER IN THE SHADERS IN OPTIONS.

IF U CAN SLEEP IN IT USING VR HEADSET AND MAKE A VIDEO AND PUT #SCREAMSFROMTHEFORESTSLEEPCHALLENGE i will mention u on my modpack page.
